mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, real_name, id_no_masked, id_card_image_url, student_card_image_url FROM student_verification_material WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_verification_material( user_id, real_name, id_no_masked, id_card_image_url, student_card_image_url ) VALUES( #{userId}, #{realName}, #{idNoMasked}, #{idCardImageUrl}, #{studentCardImageUrl} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE real_name = VALUES(real_name), id_no_masked = VALUES(id_no_masked), id_card_image_url = VALUES(id_card_image_url), student_card_image_url = VALUES(student_card_image_url)
